title: SETHANDLER
text: SETHANDLER Specifies the component instance to serve as the SAX handler. SETHANDLER(Instance) Copy Parameters Table 1. SETHANDLER parameters Parameter Data Type Direction Description Instance String IN Name of the component instance that handles SAX callback operations. Return Values Table 2. SETHANDLER return values Number Error Description –59 <UACTERR_NO_OPERATION> No callback operation can be found. Description This operation must be activated prior to calling PARSE or PARSEFILE . A valid handler component must implement at least one of the supported callback operations. Otherwise, SETHANDLER returns an error. Explain this code activate $50.setHandler($instancename) Copy This will set the current component instance as the SAX handler instance. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
